message:
fix(doctor): skip rig dirs whose .beads symlinks to town root

The rig-routes-jsonl check incorrectly treated deacon/ as a rig because
its .beads symlink resolves to the town root .beads directory. This caused
the check to find and delete town-level routes.jsonl, breaking prefix routing.

Fix uses os.SameFile() to compare .beads inodes and skip directories whose
.beads resolves to the same file as town root .beads.

Based on PR #2006 by michaelatdopple.

Co-Authored-By: michaelatdopple <michaelatdopple@users.noreply.github.com>
